name: Awaysis Capital, Inc.
business: Awaysis Capital, Inc. is a real estate management and hospitality company that acquires, redevelops, sells, and manages bookings and rentals of residential vacation home communities in travel destinations. It targets undervalued residential/resort communities and rebrands them under the Awaysis brand. The company sells developed units to buyers or retains them for short/long-term hotel stays, and also manages bookings for third-party owners for a fee.
sellsTo: homeowners who opt for management services

exposures.sentence: We seek to create value through the targeting and acquisition, development, and up-cycling, rebranding, and repositioning of currently undervalued operating and shovel ready residential/resort communities in global travel destinations, with the intention to relaunch these assets under the Awaysis brand.

We are a real estate management and hospitality company focused on acquisition, redevelopment, sales, and managing bookings and rentals, of residential vacation home communities in desirable travel destinations.

catalysts.event: Opening of Spa and Wellness Center and restaurant at Chial Reserve Assets
catalysts.sentence: Both the Spa and Wellness Center and the restaurant are anticipated to open by the end of calendar year 2025.

catalysts.event: Renovation of waterfront villas at Casamora
catalysts.sentence: We have projected to have these renovated by the end of calendar year 2025.

catalysts.event: Completion of condominium complex at Casamora
catalysts.sentence: We expect the total remaining construction costs to complete development of the Awaysis Casamora Assets to be approximately $3,015,000, and estimate completion, assuming availability of funds, to occur in the second half of calendar year 2026.
We expect the Reverse Split to take effect in our fiscal quarter ending December 31, 2025.

catalysts.event: Consummation of purchase of 107-acre parcel adjacent to Chial Reserve Assets
catalysts.sentence: the Company expects to consummate on or before December 31, 2025.
